debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
a : U
h1 : a ∈ A
h2 : empty (A \ {a})
⊢ A = {a}

proof:
by
    apply Set.ext
    intro x
    have h3 : x ∈ A ↔ x = a := by
      constructor
      · intro h
        by_contra h'
        have h4 : x ≠ a := h'
        have h5 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
          have h6 : x ∈ A := h
          have h7 : x ∉ ({a} : Set U) := by
            simp_all [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
          exact ⟨h6, h7⟩
        have h8 : ¬(x ∈ A \ {a}) := by
          simp_all [empty]
        exact h8 h5
      · intro h
        rw [h]
        exact h1
    have h9 : x ∈ A ↔ x ∈ ({a} : Set U) := by
      simp_all [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    exact h9
failed_attempts:
by
  have h3 : A ⊆ {a} := by
    intro x hx
    by_contra hx'
    -- If x ≠ a, then x ∈ A \ {a}
    have h4 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
      refine' ⟨hx, _⟩
      intro hxa
      apply hx'
      simp_all [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    -- But A \ {a} is empty, so this is a contradiction
    have h5 : x ∉ A \ {a} := by
      have h6 : empty (A \ {a}) := h2
      simp_all [Set.empty_iff]
    exact h5 h4
  -- Since a ∈ A, {a} ⊆ A
  have h4 : {a} ⊆ A := by
    intro x hx
    have h5 : x = a := by
      simp_all [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    rw [h5]
    exact h1
  -- Therefore, A = {a}
  exact Set.Subset.antisymm h3 h4

by
  apply Set.Subset.antisymm
  · -- Prove A ⊆ {a}
    intro x hx
    by_contra h
    -- If x ≠ a, then x ∈ A \ {a}, which is empty
    have h3 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by

    have h4 : ¬(x ∈ A \ {a}) := by

  · -- Prove {a} ⊆ A
    intro x hx
    -- Since A contains a and x = a, x ∈ A
    simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx
    rw [hx]
    exact h1

  have h3 : x = a := by simpa using hx
  rw [h3]
  exact h1

by
  apply Set.Subset.antisymm
  · -- Prove A ⊆ {a}
    intro x hx
    have h3 : x ∈ A := hx
    by_cases h4 : x = a
    · -- Case x = a
      simp_all [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    · -- Case x ≠ a
      have h5 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
        apply Set.mem_diff_of_mem h3
        intro h6
        apply h4
        simp_all [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
      have h6 : ¬(x ∈ A \ {a}) := by
        intro h7
        have h8 : x ∈ A \ {a} := h7
        have h9 : empty (A \ {a}) := h2
        have h10 : x ∈ (A \ {a} : Set U) := h8
        exact empty_iff.mp h9 x h10
      exact absurd h5 h6
  · -- Prove {a} ⊆ A
    intro x hx
    have h3 : x = a := by simp_all [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    rw [h3]
    exact h1

by
  have h_subset : A ⊆ {a} := by
    intro x hx
    by_cases h : x = a
    · -- Case: x = a
      simp_all [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    · -- Case: x ≠ a
      have h3 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
        constructor <;> simp_all [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
        <;> tauto
      -- Since A \ {a} is empty, we derive a contradiction
      have h4 : ¬(x ∈ A \ {a}) := by
        have h5 : empty (A \ {a}) := h2
        exact h5 h3
      contradiction
  
  have h_superset : {a} ⊆ A := by
    intro x hx
    have h3 : x = a := by simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using hx
    rw [h3]
    exact h1
  
  have h_main : A = {a} := by
    apply Set.Subset.antisymm
    · -- Prove A ⊆ {a}
      exact h_subset
    · -- Prove {a} ⊆ A
      exact h_superset
  
  exact h_main

by
  have h3 : A ⊆ {a} := by
    intro x hx
    by_contra h
    have h4 : x ≠ a := by
      intro h5
      apply h
      simp_all
    have h5 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
      constructor <;> simp_all [Set.ext_iff]
      <;> tauto
    have h6 : ¬ empty (A \ {a}) := by
      intro h7
      have h8 := h7.nonempty
      simp_all [Set.ext_iff]
      <;> tauto
    simp_all [Set.ext_iff]
    <;> tauto
  
  have h4 : {a} ⊆ A := by
    intro x hx
    have h5 : x = a := by simp_all [Set.ext_iff]
    rw [h5]
    exact h1
  
  have h5 : A = {a} := by
    apply Set.Subset.antisymm h3 h4
  
  exact h5

  apply Set.Subset.antisymm
  · -- Show that A ⊆ {a}
    intro x hx
    have h3 : x ∈ A := hx
    by_cases h4 : x = a
    · -- If x = a, then x ∈ {a}
      simp_all
    · -- If x ≠ a, then x ∈ A \ {a}
      have h5 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
        simp_all [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
        <;> tauto
      -- But A \ {a} is empty, so we have a contradiction
      have h6 : x ∈ (∅ : Set U) := by
        have h7 : A \ {a} = ∅ := by simpa [Set.ext_iff] using h2
        rw [h7] at h5
        exact h5
      exfalso
      exact Set.not_mem_empty x h6
  · -- Show that {a} ⊆ A
    intro x hx
    have h3 : x = a := by simpa using hx
    rw [h3]
    exact h1

by
    apply Set.ext
    intro x
    have h3 : x ∈ A ↔ x = a := by
      constructor
      · intro h
        by_contra h'
        have h4 : x ≠ a := h'
        have h5 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
          have h6 : x ∈ A := h
          have h7 : x ∉ ({a} : Set U) := by
            simp_all [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
          exact ⟨h6, h7⟩
        have h8 : ¬(x ∈ A \ {a}) := by
          simp_all [empty]
        exact h8 h5
      · intro h
        rw [h]
        exact h1
    have h9 : x ∈ A ↔ x ∈ ({a} : Set U) := by
      simp_all [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    exact h9
